SourceA

For revenue agencies

sourcea.app · hello@sourcea.app

Win clients with a live demo — not another deck.

Custom builds ($3–10K), monthly platform seats (from $2K/mo), or your own licensed stack — every job logged so you can show clients what ran.

Agency workflow

01 AttractTracked outreach · every send logged
02 Prove15-min live demo · no deck
03 Close$3–10K project · deposit on scope
04 ExpandWeekly report · retainer revenue

What you deliver to clients

Build · safety checks · delivery record · replay · done-for-you handoff · weekly export — one workflow agencies use to close.

Pricing bands

Ops Health Audit

$750

  • 48-hour spine review
  • Board-ready PDF
  • Path to full build
Agent Loop Build

$3–10K

  • Live in 2–3 weeks
  • 50% deposit · balance on delivery
  • Handoff + live demo
Retainer

from $2K/mo

  • Weekly client report
  • Approval before risky changes
  • Ongoing ops support (retainer)

Handoff includes

  • Delivery summary — what ran, what passed, what was blocked
  • Replay link — re-run without chat history
  • Weekly export path — HTML/PDF for your client
